'''[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Ch'arb''' was an officer aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. He was responsible for escorting the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Stauz Czycz|Awarru Tark]] to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] chamber.

{{Char-stub}}
